Data Analyst Intern (Hybrid) — Summer 2027

About Us
Northwind Analytics is a Toronto fintech founded 12 years ago. Our mission is
to make data useful. We use Kafka and Snowflake across the company. Visit
https://northwind.example.com to learn more.

What You'll Do
- Pull raw order data with SQL queries and build reports
- Build interactive dashboards for the operations team
- Present findings to stakeholders every sprint

Requirements
- Currently enrolled in a Bachelor's degree in a quantitative field
- 2+ years of experience with Python for data analysis
- Strong SQL skills
- Excellent communication skills

Nice to Have
- Familiarity with Tableau
- Experience with Git

Compensation & Benefits
The pay range for this role is $24 - $28 per hour (CAD). We offer a health
spending account and a transit pass.

How to Apply
Apply by March 15, 2027 at https://jobs.example.com/apply/da-intern or email
recruiting@northwind.example.com. The term begins May 3, 2027.

Northwind is an equal opportunity employer. Accommodations are available on
request throughout the recruitment process.
